rationale: The previous attempt asserted ensures-conjuncts about post1_self_/post2_self_ at the top of the proof body, but those facts live on the LHS of the implication in `ensures`, so Verus only has them as hypotheses when the antecedent is introduced explicitly. The fix is to wrap every assertion in `if <antecedent> { ... }` so all conjuncts are in scope; inside the if-block we then do the cross-run extensionality and trigger-instantiation work that lines up the two `forall`-shaped ensures on the post1 and post2 sides.
